title: claytonia perfoliata var. depressa
intro: Claytonia perfoliata var. depressa, also known as miner's lettuce or winter purslane, is a perennial plant that belongs to the purslane family (Portulacaceae) and is native to North America. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Claytonia perfoliata var. depressa include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Claytonia perfoliata var. depressa can be consumed as a salad green, used in herbal teas, or made into a tincture or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties.
